subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Rome | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-6205
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Rome needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Alan Turing seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-6205. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
